subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, Dr. Esslemont et al, spoken on 1919-12-07
subcodes.first_line: It is the same Beit-ul-Adl... It is like parliament... They [women] will become members of the Beit-ul-Adl in the future. The time will come when women will reach the degree of men
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @equality of men and women, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
